ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock symbol (e.g., INET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock symbol */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the stock belongs (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The specific industry within the sector (e.g., Internet Services, Biotechnology) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data entry */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading activity */,
  "volume_buy" INTEGER /* Volume of buy orders */,
  "volume_sell" INTEGER /* Volume of sell orders */,
  "value_buy" REAL /* Total value of buy orders */,
  "value_sell" REAL /* Total value of sell orders */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of market share */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of trades (buy + sell) on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source from which the data was retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user for additional contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of widget (e.g., chart, table, news feed) */,
  "position_x" INTEGER /* The x-coordinate of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "position_y" INTEGER /* The y-coordinate of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "width" INTEGER /* The width of the widget */,
  "height" INTEGER /* The height of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The API key required to access the external data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* The date and time when the data source was last checked for updates */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* The name of the source where the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* The URL to an image associated with the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "price" REAL /* Current market price */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market data was retrieved */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The total volume of trades for the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* The change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* The percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON object or comma-separated string of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
